summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise technology experience and strong production alignment to Spark/PySpark, Python, SQL, Parquet, large-scale data processing, and banking analytics workloads. Built and supported data pipelines, reporting datasets, forecasting platforms, and production troubleshooting workflows in regulated financial environments. Strong fit for Scotiabank's Spark-focused data engineering role through hands-on Python/PySpark, SQL transformation, Hadoop/Hive familiarity, cloud data platform migration, testing, logging, documentation, and performance-minded engineering practices.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built and supported Python/Pandas and PySpark-oriented ETL pipelines processing enterprise telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints for banking capacity analytics, reporting, and forecasting use cases.
Designed data processing workflows and optimized Oracle/AWS data platform components for historical retention, analytical queries, and reliable downstream reporting consumed by senior stakeholders.
Used SQL, Python, PySpark/Spark concepts, Parquet/Snappy, S3, Glue, Athena, and Redshift patterns to move legacy telemetry and forecasting workloads toward scalable cloud data processing.
Troubleshot production data quality, performance, and pipeline issues across monitoring feeds from BMC TrueSight, CA Wily/APM, and AppDynamics, improving trust in reporting and capacity decisions.
Developed validation, reconciliation, documentation, and operational reporting practices for recurring data workflows in a regulated banking environment.
Created executive-facing Streamlit and Python visualization/reporting outputs that converted complex infrastructure telemetry into usable analytics and action-oriented insights.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics monitoring for critical hospitality systems and mined real-user and synthetic performance data to surface optimization recommendations.
Led the FAST project, transforming Gomez Synthetic Monitoring and Dynatrace performance data into analytics used by engineering teams to improve web and mobile user experience.
Implemented end-user monitoring and transaction tracing, strengthening production diagnostics, troubleshooting, and reliability reporting across application teams.

experience.title: SME for CA APM / Senior Consultant
bullets: Served as enterprise CA APM SME for a large financial services client, managing monitoring standards across 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000-6,000 instrumented agents.
Built Perl/Korn shell and SQL-driven data extraction/reporting automation, replacing manual weekly exports and improving operational visibility for performance teams.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, documentation, and training materials adopted by client teams for production monitoring and troubleshooting.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC platform while preserving performance, reliability, and data correctness.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation and testing utilities to verify migration correctness across large transaction datasets.
Automated schema conversion, data validation, and performance testing steps to reduce migration risk during phased cutover.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PySpark, Java, Scala concepts, PL/SQL, Perl, Korn Shell, XML, JSON

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python and PySpark-oriented forecasting platform for banking-scale telemetry, replacing manual forecasting with automated data pipelines, validation, and executive-facing analytics.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a cloud data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Parquet/Snappy, and Bedrock patterns to support scalable ETL, analytics, and AI-assisted data access.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an agentic Python workflow for scoring, tailoring, quality-gating, and tracking job applications using LLM APIs, vector embeddings, structured JSON artifacts, and automated checks.
